specific_question: How many EV motor prototypes did Elexion Automotive’s digital engineering team simulate using digital twins between January 1 and September 30, 2025?
answer: According to internal testing records, Elexion’s digital engineering team simulated 24 EV motor prototypes between Q1 and Q3 2025 to test material durability and assembly procedures.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
